subject: docs(claude): replace implementations table with source folder reference
body:
Removed the duplicated implementations table and adopted patterns list.
Replaced with a reference to docs/implementations/ as the source of truth.
Added note to always read source files before implementing — never rely
on summaries or memory.

Tags: documentation, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cross-project-alignment
Semver: patch
